construction: per-item candidates: GloVe-6B rank band [r/2, 2r] (top-100k), alphabetic, len>=2, not probe/template word, WordNet-attested in the bank POS; <=80 per item ordered by |log(rank/r)|; prep bank = closed-class hand list (DEVIATION: loose frequency match within closed class, flagged). Runner draws k=100 sets, fixed seed, no within-set duplicates, per-model in-vocab filtered.
